== Notes for [[Item:Q118835|Q118835]] ==

'''Tecla Diaz''' born 1060 or before died after 1104

Daughter of a Diego Álvarez, possibly Diego Álvarez de Ayala, who ruled Asturias de Santillana, but more probably Diego Álvarez de Oca.

In the year of 1076 Inigo purchases a villa in San Ramon de Cameros la Rioja
Source: Ubieto Arteta, 1976 Cartulario de San Millan, Valencia 759 - 1076, 1976

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
